title: Astrantia Claret Masterwort Tall Red Flowering Herbaceous Perennial Garden Shrub (15-30cm Incl. Pot)
features: Characteristics: Clump-forming herbaceous perennial plant with deeply cut mid-to-dark green foliage and upright stems carrying deep purple-red flowers in Summer.
Growth & Spread: Ultimate height of 0.5 – 1m and spread of 0.1 – 0.5m.

Period of Interest: Summer interest. Tall stems bearing deeply coloured blooms consisting of umbels of tiny deep purple florets with pure white at the base and surrounded by similarly coloured bracts throughout Summer.

Water & Maintenance: Plant in moist, humus-rich, fertile, well-drained soils. Keep in full or partial sun in a sheltered position. Tolerates drier conditions once established, though not fully drought tolerant.
